case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. CHELSEA WATTS et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WATTS, CHELSEA DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-21-2012

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION OF JURISDICTIONAL FACTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $252.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WATTS, CHELSEA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WATTS, CHELSEA $4,557.75 PRINCIPAL, $1,083.87 INTEREST, $252.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,893.62, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
